od_description: Nawa Kadal / Qamarwari (NW Srinagar) ↔ Zoonimar (near Soura, N Srinagar). A NW–N city cross-route.
stops_verdict: Strong stops along the corridor; genuine boarding points.
narrative: Endpoints Zoonimar (adjoins Soura) and Nawa Kadal (on the Qamarwari–Batamaloo road) match FDR-270 'Soura to Qamarwari' at 0.78 overlap — clearly the route. 47 runs / 11 drivers. Not informal.
evidence_used: FDR-270 'Soura to Qamarwari' 0.78 overlap + endpoint-name alignment
data_quality_flags: implied_headway 429 min is a partial-adoption artifact
